emails.subject: Continental Power
emails.body: Sally, I hope that things went well in Calgary. I am rapping things up here and I cannot wait to return home. My tentative meeting with Joe Gold for this afternoon has been rescheduled for 9:00 this morning. Attached is my assessment of the Continental Power operations which I intend to discuss with him. The first page is for Joe in case he would like to keep notes from our discussion and the second page is more detailed for myself. Joe asked that he and I meet privately to discuss the operations. I've tried to be candid, but yet politically correct. Today I am having lunch with Fernly and meeting with the Weather Commercial team at 4:00. I'll phone to give you an update, Todd

emails.subject: Re: Continental Power
emails.body: Re: Continental Power Thanks for the update and attachment. It will be great to have you back here in Houston. I have heard lots of good things about your assignment there, however, so I know that the London group will miss your presence. I will try to call you Wednesday morning on my way into the office. I.
